resetSettings.title: Reset Settings
resetSettings.message: This will restore all settings to their default values. This action cannot be undone.

confirmDelete.title: Delete skipped section
confirmDelete.message: Are you sure you want to delete this skipped section ?

editSkippedSection.notes: Map Calibration: Use sliders to manually adjust your location if the map position doesn't accurately reflect your entered distance.

errors.endBeforeStart: End distance must be greater than start distance
errors.overlap: This segment overlaps with an existing skipped section.

marker.title: Trail marker mode
marker.description: Enter the mile or km marker from the trail to update your position. The app will automatically account for any skipped sections.

manual.title: Manual distance mode
bestFor: When no trail markers are available
manual.description: Enter the total distance you hiked based on your watch or personal estimation. The app will automatically account for any skipped sections.
